film.title: Death of a Salesman
film.overview: Willy Loman, an aging, failing salesman, struggles to accept reality and his failure to achieve the American Dream.

dialogues.dialogue: - You never knew how to play cards. - All right.  Next time I'll bring a deck with five aces.  - I don't play that kind of game. - You ought to be ashamed of yourself.  - Yeah? - Yeah!  - Ignoramus. - So, you're William?

Where are your sons? Wort your sons give you a hand?  Oh, they're working on a very big deal.  This is no time for false pride.  Go to your sons and tell them you're tired.  You got two great boys there.

He came back after that month and took his sneakers.  Remember those sneakers with the University of Virginia on them?  He was so proud of them. Wore them every day.  He took them down into the cellar, burned them up in the furnace.  We had a fistfight.
dialogues.cause_raw: owning sneakers with the University of Virginia on them
